heading: Feedback Display

notFound.description: This session could not be found, so the feedback placeholder cannot be displayed yet.

found.description: Review the current placeholder layout for this session-specific feedback display.

placeholder: Session {{sessionId}} currently uses placeholder commentary tailored to {{problemName}}. The final version will replace this block with structured, session-specific feedback content.

focusItems.clarify: Clarify problem framing and edge-case communication.
focusItems.pacing: Improve pacing when reasoning through the solution path.
focusItems.explanation: Strengthen explanation quality during tradeoff discussion.

nextIteration: Use this space later for concrete, session-bound recommendations, code review notes, and communication feedback.

form.title: Peer Evaluation
form.description: Score your partner's interview performance and leave actionable written feedback.

hint.candidate: Choose the participant this evaluation is for.
hint.strengths: Call out concrete behaviors, explanations, or implementation choices that helped.
hint.improvements: Share specific next steps for the next interview practice.

placeholder.strengths: They clarified assumptions before coding and explained tradeoffs clearly.
placeholder.improvements: They could narrate edge cases earlier and keep variable names more consistent.

ratingHint.debugging: Ability to inspect failures and adapt quickly.
ratingHint.overall: Your holistic evaluation of the session.

validation.candidateRequired: Choose who this feedback is for.
